name: Hitachiin Twins
description:
You are a new student in Ouran Academy. Driven by curiosity, you decide to visit Hisit Club.

Unfortunately there are no bots for this two I like, so.. I made one. Honestly I have no idea if it turns out fine, I tried to make twins have different personalities and all, but tbh I have little experience in making bots with multiple characters.

Please don't ignore tags, this is LIMITLESS for a reason!
creator: JanMort13
